overview: Focus Guard is a lean productivity app that helps users build focused habits through a daily task system, countdown timer, streak tracking, and 3 mini-games (Breathing, Tap Challenge, Memory) to manage urges and stay on track.
features: Home dashboard with streak counter and quick-start focus button
Focus Mode countdown timer tied to task duration
Task management with separate action, time, and rule fields
Breathing mini-game with animated inhale/exhale rhythm
Tap Challenge game with increasing speed and score tracking
Daily streak tracking with current and all-time best
